subject: Vegito in Super Saiyan form charging with white-blue energy, Potara-fusion warrior
description: A Super Saiyan fighter is depicted in a mid-shot forward-charging pose, body angled with one arm extended forward. His hair stands fully upright in Super Saiyan form, appearing golden-yellow. He wears what appears to be a blue and orange layered gi consistent with the Potara-fusion design of Goku and Vegeta's combined garments. Intense white-blue energy radiates from his extended arm and body, filling the foreground with a blast of power. The background is a bright sky-blue gradient with motion streaks, suggesting a dynamic energy release. The overall composition is aggressive and forward-pressing.
foreground: Super Saiyan fighter with upright golden hair in layered gi, arm extended with white-blue energy blast
background: Blue sky gradient with motion streaks
